Mairee Silentone  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search

Updated Mairee Silentone

Uploaded May 9th, 2011 by Eikare

Mairee Silentone is for the Ranger epic quest.

Category: EverQuest
This page last modified 2008-01-02 15:04:50.

Level: 60
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2020-06-25 03:14:47
Items Given:
Dwarven Smiths Hammer
Hammer of the Ancients

Known Habitats:
  Erudin Palace
Quests:
  Ranger Epic 1.5 Pre-Quest
  Ranger Epic: Swiftwind and Earthcaller

Report a correction

Post Comment
Faction and following quest.
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2014 at 12:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1715559370129
View User Forum
169 posts
OK, I just did my hand in to her with dubious faction, and having never been to Odus before, and had no problems. The ranger is a Half Elf, and the only factioning done prior to this was the Muffin for Pandos and the Bat Wing Quests. I have another account with a high lvl shaman who had the Swirling Sphere already, come with me and do a MQ of the sphere. The shaman is a Troll, and while I remember doing factioning on him in the Warrens, I couldn't remember if his faction was high enough to get into the city, as I was more concerned over him getting mobbed by guards and ******** his faction even more. He was apprehensive to the guards, so I thought Yay! first hurdle over. I ran him through all the teleporters up to the one that gets you in to the palace. Here I got attacked by a wood elf who stands at the platform. Wasn't a big issue, as the teleporter is right there. Just ran onto it and zoned. Once inside the palace proper, I again checked faction with the guards, still apprehensive, so I ran to the bank, and checked faction there. Uh-oh, bankers are KoS. But they didn't attack, and they let me use the bank. Got the Sphere out of bank, and ran to Sothure's Gems, and again checked faction. Was apprehensive to the jewelers, and dubious to Mairee. So I ran the Ranger, and she basically conned pretty much everything on the same scale as the shaman. I know Mairee isn't on any of the Erudite factions, as the guards in Paineel con apprehensive or higher to my shaman, since he factioned primarily to get access to the Hole. And he would need at least apprehensive to get the key to Paineel and get past guards. And he has all his epics, and I know the shaman 1.0 is all True Spirit faction, so he should be better than dubious. Anyway, got the Ranger there, Mairee conned dubious. So I started worrying about losing my items. I hailed her, and she wouldn't say anything. checked quest page again, and saw it said to talk to her about an ancient hammer. So I asked, and she started the dialog, and asked to see hammer. Handed hammer, and she returned the new version. Next thing, was I handed the sphere in on the Shaman, then switched to Ranger and handed in hammer again, and got back the new version again. My point is, you shouldn't need to do any fancy factioning with her, or stand behind her, to get her to give you the new versions. Just start the quest correctly, by asking her about the ancient hammer. My ranger stood right there in front of her, as did the shaman, both dubious, and got everything accomplished without sneak, invis or any other tricks. People need to learn to follow directions, that's what a lot of EQ is about. Read, comprehend, and implement.
▲ Page top
RANGER EPIC ....
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2012 at 9:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618792172162
View User Forum
27 posts
WELL this is not right ... didnt know was to get bhind her ...she took hammer and didnt give it back ... grrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrgrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr so now what .. i not doing agin
▲ Page top
How to find her
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2006 at 7:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1686529028957
Scholar
342 posts
These directions assume you know how to get to the Erudin Palace. There are two ways to find Mairee:

1) When you first zone into ERUDIN PALACE, use the FIND tool to locate "Sothure Gemcutter" who is standing next to Mairee.

If FIND is not working:

2) When you first zone into ERUDIN PALACE, take the stairs down on the left (North) side of the first big room. Once in the downstairs room (with the long water trough running North-to-South), take the first door on the left (NorthEast corner) with the sign "Sothure's Fine Gems". Inside, go through the door behind the counter (beside Anite Gemcutter). In the back room you will find Mairee and Sothure.

Did successful hand-in of "Soulbound Hammer" while dubious to Mairee.

Edited, Fri Mar 31 18:32:14 2006
▲ Page top
How to find her

in fact she is on no faction, i was mqing the sphere today and had 2 different ppl try to hand it in. After she wouldnt take spheres from both i paid the guy 1k to kill her... she respawned after about 15 mins and i MQ the swirling sphere. The monk said he took no faction hit for the kill... and wasnt KoS after she respawned.

Has anyone tried to MQ the Dwarven Smiths Hammer and the Swirling Sphere of Color turnin for the Ranger epic?? What about faction issues of both parties, I know that with the shaman epic faction plays an important part when you want to do a MQ. I don't seem to remember any faction messesages while doing the ranger epic however.
▲ Page top
Ranger Turn in for Mariee Silentsong
QuoteReply
# May 25 2003 at 1:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257668531
26 posts
Don't do the SK quest in OT. It is a waste of your time, if you are just trying to turn in the hammer for the ranger epic.

First of all. She is in the palace not the city. bottom floor in the gem shop. Turn left when you enter the shop there is a door go thru it and you will find her glaring at you dubiously.

Go behind her and HIDE. You become indifferent. Turn in the hammer and you only have a few more steps to go until you are epiced

Enjoy!

Edited, Sun May 25 14:00:47 2003
▲ Page top
Ranger Turn in for Mariee Silentsong
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2014 at 12:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1668989855857
Scholar
41 posts
Don't hide from her ask her the question and she will accept the hammer and give it back to you. Same with the sphere and the hammer. And the question to ask her is : What ancient hammer? Then you hand it to her.

You can't turn anything in while you are hidden, but you can sneak, which is what I did to do the first turn-in of the hammer.
